response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including embedded systems and C/C++ (National Instruments, robotic arms), but lacks direct experience with embedded networking security features (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X) or Linux kernel modification for security. His strongest technical skills are in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with limited exposure to networking APIs (NETCONF, SNMP) or security-specific embedded firmware. Native Japanese proficiency is also unconfirmed. However, his broad systems programming background and open-source contributions could justify evaluating his adaptability in an interview.
strengths: Strong C/C++ experience for embedded/low-level systems (National Instruments, robotic arms)
Proven ability to learn and adapt across diverse tech stacks (JavaScript/TypeScript, Dlang, C++)
Active open-source contributor with demonstrated project ownership (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) and technical talks/workshops
concerns: No direct experience with embedded networking security features (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X) or Linux kernel modifications for security
Limited exposure to required networking APIs (NETCONF, SNMP) or embedded switch chip technologies
Native Japanese proficiency not visible in resume; English is fluent but spoken English is only a 'plus' in requirements

key_factors.factor: Embedded C/C++ experience for security-critical systems
Direct experience with security features (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption)
